daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are asking you to slow down and actually listen—to others and to yourself. There's wisdom in the quiet moments today. Trust the gentle nudges.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing you more than you realize. Whether single or coupled, authenticity is your superpower rn. Let them see the real you without the armor.
daily.career: Your ideas have more weight than usual. If you've been sitting on a thought or project, today's the day to speak up. Your grounded perspective is exactly what's needed.
daily.health: Your body's asking for slow, intentional movement—think walks, stretching, or whatever feels restorative. Nourish yourself like you actually matter (because you do).

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to soften those walls a bit, Cap. Mercury's moving through your zone of vulnerability, making it easier to express what's been sitting in your chest. Trust the process—authenticity is your superpower right now.
weekly.love: Your heart's been cautious, but the stars are gently nudging you toward openness. Whether you're single or coupled up, genuine conversations are flowing easier than usual. Let someone see the real you—messy feelings included. Connection over perfection always wins.
weekly.career: You're radiating quiet confidence this week, and people are noticing. Your ideas might seem unconventional, but lean into that. The universe is rewarding your willingness to do things differently. Trust your instincts when something feels aligned.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler movement right now—think yoga, walks, stretching rather than intensity. Energy levels might dip midweek, so honor that by prioritizing rest. Listen to what your physical self needs; it's speaking louder than usual.
